# Bridge Up

> Bridge Up is a free iPhone, iPad, Mac, and CarPlay app that shows real-time lift-bridge
> status, reopening predictions, and live vessel tracking for 15 bridges in the St. Lawrence
> Seaway region of Canada: the Welland Canal (St. Catharines, Thorold, Port Colborne) and the
> greater Montréal area (Montréal South Shore, Kahnawake, Beauharnois / Salaberry-de-Valleyfield).

Key facts:

- Completely free: all 15 bridges, CarPlay, live status, predictions, and vessel tracking are
  included. No ads, no account required, no subscriptions, no in-app purchases.
- CarPlay support: glanceable bridge status while driving, a map with nearby bridges as points
  of interest, and one-tap navigation via Apple Maps, Google Maps, or Waze.
- Reopening predictions: estimated reopening times with 95% confidence intervals, computed from
  the most recent ~300 closures of each individual bridge, plus "closing soon" warnings.
- Live vessel tracking: see the ships transiting the canal that are causing each closure.
  Primary data source is an AIS antenna operated by the developer in St. Catharines,
  supplemented by AISHub community data.
- Coverage: the only regions covered are listed below; Bridge Up covers both the Niagara
  (Welland Canal) and Montréal areas in one app.
- Platforms: iPhone, iPad, Mac, and Apple Vision Pro (iOS / iPadOS / macOS / visionOS 26 or
  later). There is no Android version, and none is planned.
- Languages: English, French, Spanish.
- Privacy: the app collects no data (App Store privacy label: "Data Not Collected").
- Developer: Avery Levitt, an independent developer. First released February 3, 2026.
- The website (https://www.bridgeup.app/bridges) shows the same live bridge map in any browser,
  no app required.

Bridges covered (15):

- St. Catharines / Welland Canal: Lakeshore Rd, Carlton St, Queenston St, Glendale Ave,
  Highway 20 (Allanburg)
- Port Colborne: Main St, Mellanby Ave, Clarence St
- Montréal South Shore: Victoria Bridge Downstream, Victoria Bridge Upstream (cycling path),
  Sainte-Catherine / RécréoParc Bridge
- Kahnawake: CP Railway Bridge 7A, CP Railway Bridge 7B
- Beauharnois / Salaberry-de-Valleyfield: St-Louis-de-Gonzague Bridge, Larocque Bridge

## Links

- [Live bridge map (web)](https://www.bridgeup.app/bridges): real-time status of all 15 bridges
  on one interactive map
- [All bridges by region](https://www.bridgeup.app/bridges/list): browsable directory of every
  covered bridge with live status and typical closure times
- [Welland Canal bridge status](https://www.bridgeup.app/bridges/welland-canal): all 8 canal road bridges (Bridge 1 to 21, St. Catharines down to Port Colborne) in canal order

Bridge status pages. Each per-bridge page has live status, reopening predictions, the average
closure time with a 95% confidence interval, and a closure-duration breakdown:

- St. Catharines (Welland Canal): [region overview](https://www.bridgeup.app/bridges/st-catharines),
  [Lakeshore Rd](https://www.bridgeup.app/bridges/st-catharines/lakeshore-rd),
  [Carlton St](https://www.bridgeup.app/bridges/st-catharines/carlton-st),
  [Queenston St](https://www.bridgeup.app/bridges/st-catharines/queenston-st),
  [Glendale Ave](https://www.bridgeup.app/bridges/st-catharines/glendale-ave),
  [Highway 20](https://www.bridgeup.app/bridges/st-catharines/highway-20)
- Port Colborne (Welland Canal): [region overview](https://www.bridgeup.app/bridges/port-colborne),
  [Main St](https://www.bridgeup.app/bridges/port-colborne/main-st),
  [Mellanby Ave](https://www.bridgeup.app/bridges/port-colborne/mellanby-ave),
  [Clarence St](https://www.bridgeup.app/bridges/port-colborne/clarence-st)
- Montréal South Shore (St. Lawrence Seaway): [region overview](https://www.bridgeup.app/bridges/montreal),
  [Victoria](https://www.bridgeup.app/bridges/montreal/victoria),
  [Sainte-Catherine / RécréoParc](https://www.bridgeup.app/bridges/montreal/sainte-catherine-recreoparc)
- Beauharnois & Salaberry-de-Valleyfield (St. Lawrence Seaway): [region overview](https://www.bridgeup.app/bridges/beauharnois),
  [Saint-Louis-de-Gonzague](https://www.bridgeup.app/bridges/beauharnois/st-louis-de-gonzague),
  [Larocque](https://www.bridgeup.app/bridges/beauharnois/larocque)

- [Download on the App Store](https://apps.apple.com/ca/app/bridge-up/id6557082394): free,
  for iPhone, iPad, Mac, and Apple Vision Pro
- [Pricing and FAQ](https://www.bridgeup.app/pricing): why it's free, prediction accuracy,
  data sources
- [About](https://www.bridgeup.app/about): the story behind the app
- [Support](https://www.bridgeup.app/support): help and contact, or email support@bridgeup.app

## Optional

- [French version](https://www.bridgeup.app/fr): site en français
- [Spanish version](https://www.bridgeup.app/es): sitio en español
- [Privacy policy](https://www.bridgeup.app/privacy)
